sentence_reviews.text: Training or post-processing aligns confidence with empirical correctness and asymmetric decision risk.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML table of contents lines 148-155 list Bayesian decision theory, classification, regression, and probabilistic prediction problems; lines 162-170 list frequentist decision theory and risk. Guo et al. arXiv abstract page was inspected for modern neural-network calibration and post-processing context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition combines calibration and risk objectives; the cited material supports these components but not as one exact sentence.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs, Statistics & experimental design.
